user_query:
I’m compiling research links for a few Melbourne and Sydney locations. Please read input/requests.json and generate property.com.au URLs according to these rules, then save the results to two files:

1) output/urls.json — a structured JSON with this exact top-level shape:
{
  "suburb_profiles": [string...],
  "sold_history": [string...],
  "buy_listings": {
    "house": [string...],
    "townhouse": [string...],
    "apartment-unit": [string...]
  },
  "street_browse": [string...],
  "property_profiles": [string...],
  "school_insights": [string...]
}

2) output/urls.txt — a newline-delimited list of all URLs from urls.json (the union of every array), sorted in ascending lexicographical order with no duplicates.

Construction rules (apply to every URL):
- Base: https://www.property.com.au/
- State, suburb, postcode segment: /{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/
  • state must be lowercase (e.g., vic, nsw)
  • suburb must be lowercase and hyphenated (spaces → dashes), then "-{postcode}"
- Street names: lowercase, spaces → dashes, and abbreviate the street type at the end: Street→st, Road→rd, Avenue→ave, Place→pl, Court→ct, Drive→dr, Crescent→cres, Terrace→tce
- School names: lowercase, spaces → dashes
- Always include a trailing slash at the end of every URL

URL patterns to create (based on entries in input/requests.json):
- Suburb profile: https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/
- Sold history: https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/sold/
- Buy listings (for each property type listed under buy_types): https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/{type}/buy/
- Street browse: https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/{street-name}/
- Property profile (requires pid): https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/{street-name}/{number}-pid-{pid}/
  • If the number contains a unit + street number (e.g., "203-1269"), keep the hyphen between them as in the example: 203-1269-pid-xxxxx
- School insights: https://www.property.com.au/{state}/{suburb}-{postcode}/schools/{school-name}-sid-{sid}/

Please ensure:
- All URLs are correctly lowercased and hyphenated as specified
- Street type abbreviations are applied exactly as listed
- Every URL ends with "/"
- No duplicates across categories; the .txt file must be a sorted union of all generated URLs

Write the two files exactly to:
- output/urls.json
- output/urls.txt
